items.title: Atishi Clarifies Arvind Kejriwal's 'Gen Z' Remark: 'Not Suggesting Violence'
items.summary: Atishi alleged that NEET aspirants are subjected to stringent rules and checks when they appear for the exam, but there are no rules for those who organise it.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: Canada's Mark Carney speaks with Artemis II crew on Earth
items.summary: Prime Minister Mark Carney met Canadian astronaut Jeremy Hansen and other crew members in Ottawa.
items.whyItMatters: World and politics stories can shift public priorities, safety context, and what people need to understand next.

items.title: PM cuts size of convoy after fuel conservation appeal
items.summary: Following the appeal, U.P. Chief Minister Yogi Adityanath directed a 50% reduction in the escort vehicles for himself and his State Cabinet colleagues
